title: TreeMiner
description: This datapack/mod works as a tree vein miner and fast leaf decayer. [Mod compatible]
body:
# TreeMiner 
### and fast leaf decay.

**VERSION 5.0.0 AVAILABLE AS OF MAY 30, 2026**

**There was previously an issue with the mod, but it has finally been thoroughly gone through, and should now work perfectly. Thank you all for your patience. And, a special thanks to one of the members from the "teammodman" discord for discovering the issue.]_**

Trees can take a while to mine, but especially when you need a lot of wood. This datapack/mod works with all vanilla wood and leaf types, and has some mod compatibility. Though not all modded leaves are not fully implemented,
**yet!**

Compatible mods include:
1. More Trees: AustinPlaysOnYT - Modrinth, MIT License
2. Missing Trees: Almiris - Modrinth, MIT License
3. Silverwood Trees: Almiris - Modrinth, MIT License
4. Whisperleaf Trees: Almiris - Modrinth, MIT License
5. Ecologics: SameButDifferent - Modrinth, MIT License
6. Environmental: Team Abnormals - Modrinth, Abnormals License
7. Autumnity: Team Abnormals - Modrinth, Abnormals License

## PUBLIC SERVICE ANNOUNCEMENT:
We got this datapack/mod to 2000+ downloads, so it is now full open-source (within the Public Domain) as well as a few other packs I will make!

## Pack Info:

What exactly does it do, though. Well, it works as a vein miner of sorts for trees, and causes faster leaf decay. Both things being often sought after features.
**[Make sure that you do not crouch if you want the feature to work, but crouch if you don't. Also, have an axe in-hand.]**

But what makes this different from others? Well, firstly, it is both a fast leaf decay and tree vein miner in one download versus two seperate ones. Second, it is run by a smaller group, so it is much more likely to be updated than big-name versions. And, last but not least, it is made for you - not simply for the money.

(Also don't forget to click the heart button to follow, to support for more updates. And, if you would like, add it to collections or modpacks that you make!)

![Image of what the datapack does (whole tree miner+fast leaf decay)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/625892e89f0055dc685d9f8db4df25d30bf9d456.gif)

### Several Minecraft versions
It works for Minecraft versions 1.21.100 (and likely further, maybe even previously). Be aware that in most versions, a warning may appear that it is for the wrong version, but it should work in most, so no worries.

#Update Info:
If there is mod that adds wood or a type of tree into it that you would like this to be updated for, then email me at nightmarelore.10@gmail.com
I will then let you know if I am legally able to update it for compatibility. If I can, I will update it.

## Created by NightML, aka NightMareLore. 

Please enjoy! But, don't feel inclined to download it, if it isn't your style.
Though there is no active content, music videos will be eventually uploaded to **@NightMareLore10** on YouTube. [Please subscribe for more updates - completely free!]

## Will Likely Update Fairly Often (as of May 29, 2026)

P.S. I try my very best to ensure that all of my content is family friendly and respectful to all culture, race, religion, and other personal factors. If anyone at any point finds something to be disrespectful or non-family friendly, then you can contact me at nightmarelore.10@gmail.com. If I personally find that my content is disrespectful in any manner, then I will **_IMMEDIATELY_** change it to ensure that my community is a safe, kind, healthy, and supportive one!
